name: 道の駅 宮地岳かかしの里
desc: 廃校になった旧宮地岳小学校を再活用した、西日本初・全国3番目の道の駅。3月末〜GWには地域住民の数を超えるかかしが並ぶ「かかし祭り」を開催。
descEn: Repurposes the former Miyajidake Elementary School building, making it the first roadside station of its kind in western Japan and the third nationwide. From late March through Golden Week, its scarecrow festival displays more scarecrows than local residents.
